title: US rejects EU objections to proposed forced labour tariffs on imports
summary:
US Trade Representative (USTR) Jamieson Greer has pushed back on EU criticism that proposed US tariffs of 10% on the bloc, over failures to stamp out the use of forced labour in supply chains, conflict with an agreement struck between the pair last year.
As reported by The Loadstar, the EU and 59 countries are facing a new, additional tariff rate of 10-12.5% on all goods for either failing to introduce ...
